consistency_check.level_type_consistent: Level 3 spell seems appropriate for its effects.

quality_assessment.clarity: The description is clear regarding effect, range, and conditions.
quality_assessment.balance: A concentration, 15-foot radius area control spell with consistent damage output (3d8 scaling by 1d8 per slot level above 3rd) and movement debuff (halved speed) is strong for a 3rd-level spell, but balanced by the concentration requirement and the save mitigating damage.
quality_assessment.flavor: Strong thematic link between alignment (Good/Neutral/Evil) and the appearance/damage type (Radiant/Necrotic).

mechanics_review.range_and_area: Self (15-foot radius) defines an immediate area of effect.
mechanics_review.duration: Concentration, up to 10 minutes allows for sustained battlefield control.
mechanics_review.save_and_damage: Wisdom save is appropriate for resisting spiritual influence. Damage application (start of turn or entry) is standard for persistent area spells. Half damage on success is standard.
mechanics_review.scaling: Damage scaling (1d8 per slot level above 3rd) is mechanically sound and ensures the spell remains relevant.

suggestions: None. The spell is well-designed and mechanically sound for its level.
